title: Welcome to the CodeSpace
text:
This newly ceated forum is aimed at early career researchers primarily from the Humanities and Social sciences to meet and discuss coding, machine learning and all the tools, techniques that go along with it – and of course to write and review code together.
The initiative behind The CodSpace is undertaken by Mathias Johansson and Philipp Jonas Kreutzer .
The first meeting will be held on 2023-12-15T15:15, please get in contact if you wish to participate!

title: About
text:
CodeSpace is a support group for coding, early career researchers from the Humanities and Social sciences.
The forum is hosted by the the Department of Arts and Cultural Sciences in close collaboration with the Department of Economic History at Lund Universty.
